rows.label: qev087707_MSG0001
rows.name: That makes six. In your face![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0002
rows.name: Beaten to the prey...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0003
rows.name:
I must confess, this is unexpected. But
the fact of your victory is plain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you hadn't shared its location,
we wouldn't have stood a chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0005
rows.name: And yet we lost nonetheless...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0006
rows.name:
No complaints, Buidhe. The original
blame for this matter lies with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0007
rows.name:
We owe them thanks for
their aid in resolving it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0008
rows.name: Yes, my prince.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_JNK0010
rows.name: Smile

rows.label: qev087707_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Ga Derg that's
what friends are for.

rows.label: qev087707_JNK0020
rows.name: Nod

rows.label: qev087707_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Ga Derg they owe you one
next time you're in trouble.

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0009
rows.name: And it wasn't really so difficult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even with machines as fine as yours, an
unskilled pilot can only do so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0011
rows.name:
This was a breeze compared to fighting
against actual Larsian pilots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0012
rows.name: You flatter us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0013
rows.name:
Very well. Next time it will
be we who come to your aid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0014
rows.name: We look forward to your time of crisis![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0015
rows.name: Then we can call it even.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hmph. The Larsians do not
enjoy living in debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0017
rows.name:
May your moment of trouble come
swiftly and without remorse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087707_MSG0018
rows.name: Geez, some friend you are![ST:wait ]
